items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★4 Regarding the PT-BR translation: I highl
items.summary: Regarding the PT-BR translation: I highly appreciate the developers for the beta version, but I think it's time for an official.
items.author: Jardeson Olivier

items.title: [Google Play 中评] ★3 The conversations between phases of boss
items.summary: The conversations between phases of bosses in story are annoying, add a skip for that please, and also add that in replay too, thanks. And please have guide for teams.
items.author: Nauth
